pi_items.source: export_result.sh checks for 'noc_system_health_wallboard' and verifier.py references 'NOC_System_Health_Wallboard'.
verifier.py anti-gaming logic checks for 'system_logs' in dashboard XML. setup_splunk.sh ingests Linux syslog data into this index.

privileged_info_summary: The expected dashboard name is verified as 'NOC_System_Health_Wallboard' which must query the 'system_logs' index. The underlying Splunk environment uses credentials 'admin' and 'SplunkAdmin1!' and ingests real-world log data from SecRepo and Loghub (Zenodo).
